features: single-sensor hub + separate 180-degree fisheye lens module design -- NOT a true 360-degree or 4-sensor 24MP multisensor camera as previously stored; that spec was fabricated
modular: UVC-AI-Theta-Hub processing unit + UVC-AI-Theta-ProLens360 lens module, connected by cable; weights: Hub 330g, Hub mount 35g, ProLens360 58g, flush mount 24g
no IR night-vision range confirmed on official spec sheet -- no IR Night Vision row present
no IP rating confirmed on official spec sheet -- not listed

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.

blue_iris.notes: Use Generic/RTSP profile with RTSPS URL from UniFi Protect. Requires Protect RTSP stream enabled per camera.
